recap:
- The AI Playground offers a user-friendly interface to test and validate your vector search index before coding.
- It helps in understanding retrieval quality and identifying issues with embeddings or chunking strategies.
- The dataset used for testing includes documents from a fictitious robot manufacturer, providing context for technical and regulatory information retrieval.
- To launch the Playground, navigate to the vector search index in Catalog Explorer and click "Try in Playground."
- The vector search index is pre-configured in the Playground, allowing for quick selection of a large language model (LLM) and query testing.
- Recommended LLM for testing is the `GPT OSS 120B` model for optimal results.
- Manual addition of the retrieval tool in the Playground is possible but the pre-configuration method is more efficient.
